import { Context } from '@kit.AbilityKit';
import { showToast } from '@aspect/CommUI';
import { ServiceEntry } from '../../data/model/ServiceEntry';
import { HomeConstants } from '../../shared/constant/HomeConstants';

@Component
export struct ServiceGridSwiper {
  @Prop services: ServiceEntry[] = [];

  private buildColumnsTemplate(): string {
    const parts: string[] = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < HomeConstants.SERVICE_GRID_COLUMNS; i++) {
      parts.push('1fr');
    }
    return parts.join(' ');
  }

  private toastNotSupported(): void {
    const ctx = this.getUIContext().getHostContext() as Context;
    showToast(ctx.resourceManager.getStringSync($r('app.string.not_supported').id));
  }

  @Builder
  gridIcon(item: ServiceEntry) {
    if (item.id === 's1') {
      Column() {
        Text(item.name)
          .fontSize(10)
          .fontColor(Color.White)
          .fontWeight(FontWeight.Medium)
      }
      .width(40)
      .height(40)
      .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
      .backgroundColor($r('app.color.text_primary'))
      .borderRadius(8)
      SymbolGlyph($r('sys.symbol.creditcard'))
        .fontSize(1)
        .opacity(0)
      Image($r('app.media.sys_symbol_creditcard'))
        .width(0)
        .height(0)
        .opacity(0)
    } else if (item.id === 's2') {
      SymbolGlyph($r('sys.symbol.creditcard'))
        .fontSize(32)
        .fontColor([$r('app.color.brand_accent_pink')])
      Image($r('app.media.sys_symbol_creditcard'))
        .width(0)
        .height(0)
        .opacity(0)
    } else if (item.id === 's3') {
      SymbolGlyph($r('sys.symbol.fuelpump'))
        .fontSize(32)
        .fontColor([$r('app.color.brand_accent_green')])
      Image($r('app.media.sys_symbol_fuelpump'))
        .width(0)
        .height(0)
        .opacity(0)
    } else {
      SymbolGlyph($r('sys.symbol.gift'))
        .fontSize(32)
        .fontColor([$r('app.color.brand_accent_red')])
      Image($r('app.media.sys_symbol_gift'))
        .width(0)
        .height(0)
        .opacity(0)
    }
  }

  build() {
    Grid() {
      ForEach(this.services, (item: ServiceEntry) => {
        GridItem() {
          Column({ space: 6 }) {
            this.gridIcon(item)
            Text(item.name)
              .fontSize(12)
              .fontColor($r('app.color.text_secondary'))
          }
          .width('100%')
          .padding(8)
          .justifyContent(FlexAlign.Center)
          .onClick(() => {
            this.toastNotSupported();
          })
        }
      }, (item: ServiceEntry) => item.id)
    }
    .columnsTemplate(this.buildColumnsTemplate())
    .rowsTemplate('1fr')
    .width('100%')
    .height(120)
  }
}
